name: generate_podcast_clips
description: Generate short-form clips from a long-form spoken video. Favors viral and high-retention spoken moments, adds captions, and returns rendered clip URLs with titles and scores.

video_url.description: Public podcast, interview, webinar, or talking-head video URL. Supports YouTube, direct MP4, and public Google Drive links.

max_clips.description: Number of clips to generate. Short videos (≤3 min) are automatically limited to 2 clips.

clip_style.description: Caption style. 'viral'/'beast' = bold animated-word captions. 'leon'/'hormozi' = single highlighted word. 'clean'/'minimal' = plain white subtitles.

format.description: Render format. 'dynamic' = auto-reframes to 9:16, detects split-screen vs solo. 'hook_frame' = preserves original frame with title card at top and captions at bottom.

captions.description: Whether to burn captions into the rendered clip.

clip_duration.description: Controls the length window for extracted clips.

min.description: Minimum clip length in seconds. Floor is 10s.

max.description: Maximum clip length in seconds. Ceiling is 60s. Must be ≥ min.
